database_schema.summary: System manages Students, Classes, Timetables, Products, Exams, and Orders.

api_endpoints.explained: Import timetable for classes. DELETES old schedule for those classes first.
Get timetable for a specific class.
Import timetable strictly for a specific class (Validates context).

features.name: Class Management
features.description: Admin can list and bulk add classes.

features.name: Timetable Management
features.description: View and Import timetables via JSON.

features.name: Check Exam (PDF Processing)
features.description: Upload PDF exam files → Extract questions → Separate answers → Compare with API syllabus → Deduplicate unmatched questions → Export results to JSON/Word.
sub_features: Position-aware PDF text extraction (prevents Vietnamese diacritical splitting)
Vietnamese text normalization (conservative - only merges incomplete syllables)
Context-aware answer separation (validates A→B→C→D order, ≥3 answers, line-start detection)
Real-time answer validation panel with click-to-scroll to problematic questions
Similarity-based question comparison with API data
Export to Word/JSON with formatted output
Two-mode input system: PDF Upload or Raw Text Paste
Enhanced FileUploader UI with file listing, size display, and clear controls
Context-free text input parser for structured question/answer formats

patterns: Check-exam uses multi-step wizard pattern: Upload → Edit → Compare → Deduplicate.
React state management replaces direct DOM manipulation for status messages.
Position-aware PDF extraction uses TextItem.transform[4] (x-pos) and width to detect word boundaries.
gotchas: MongoDB Transaction requires Replica Set. For standalone, use sequential Delete -> Insert logic.
Importing Timetable performs a HARD REPLACE (Delete old -> Insert new).
PDF.js TextItem spacing: gap < 15% fontSize = same word (diacritical split), gap > 15% = separate words. 30% was too aggressive and caused word merging.
Vietnamese normalizeVietnameseText MUST be conservative: Only merge when prefix has NO vowel AND ≤3 chars. 'Chán ăn' has vowel 'á' in 'Chán' → do NOT merge. 'M ẫu' has no vowel in 'M' → merge.

AnswerSeparator regex must NOT use greedy patterns matching any A/B/C/D with whitespace. Must require line-start position + validate ≥3 answers in A→B→C→D order to avoid false positives like 'Vitamin C', 'Người bệnh B'.
Answer marker regex lookahead must allow digits after answer letter: 'A 7 ngày' is valid. (?=[^\s\d]) is wrong, (?=\S) is correct.
Questions without ':' or '?' terminator still have valid answers - use position of first answer candidate as boundary.
Text input parsing uses regex: ^(?:Câu\s*(?:hỏi)?\s+)?(\d+)\s*[\.\:\)]\s* to match number/question prefixes.
Answer marks in text parsing support formats: A., A), A:, A-, A (space).
conventions: check-exam components: AnswerSeparator, AnswerValidation, QuestionExtractor, QuizPreview, TwoColumnLayout, ComparisonView, etc.
check-exam hooks: usePdfProcessor, useQuestions, useComparison, useDeduplication, useExportFunctions, useProduct.
Question format uses '#' as delimiter between question text and each answer option.
TwoColumnLayout question rows have id='question-row-{index}' for scroll targeting.
